nasb.text: (For the Pharisees and all the Jews do not eat unless they carefully wash their hands, thus observing the traditions of the elders;

esv.text: (For the Pharisees and all the Jews do not eat unless they wash their hands properly, holding to the tradition of the elders,

ccb.text: 因为法利赛人和所有的犹太人都拘守祖先的传统，总是先照礼仪洗手之后才吃饭；

csbs.text: 原来，法利赛人和所有的犹太人都拘守古人的传统：如果不按规矩洗手就不吃饭；
